description: You are a Technical Marketing Manager auditing social media previews. Use Screaming Frog SEO Spider to crawl 'https://crawler-test.com/' and extract Open Graph metadata, specifically 'OG Title' and 'OG Image' content. Export the crawl data including these custom extraction columns as a CSV file named 'social_tags_export.csv' to '~/Documents/SEO/exports/'. Additionally, create a text report at '~/Documents/SEO/reports/missing_social_tags.txt' that lists the total number of URLs crawled, the number of URLs missing Open Graph tags, and at least three specific URLs that are missing them.
